description.zh: 西非最强大的帝国之一，以曼萨穆萨的传奇财富闻名。建立在跨撒哈拉贸易基础上，廷巴克图成为学术中心，格里奥口述传统保存历史记忆。
description.en: One of West Africa's mightiest empires, famed for Mansa Musa's legendary wealth. Built on trans-Saharan trade, with Timbuktu as a center of learning and the griot oral tradition preserving historical memory.
